/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/trigger_sanity_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/trigger_sanity_test.dir/servo/test_trigger_sanity_check.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trigger_sanity_test.dir/servo/trigger_sanity_check.cpp.o -o trigger_sanity_test   -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib  -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib:/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib -lm -lpthread
